trending_videos.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song “Runway” performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel—Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as “Lily” and “Irv” from the first film. 
 
“The Devil Wears Prada 2” is produced by Wendy Finer

trending_videos.description:
A classic reborn for television - Lord of the Flies Premieres May 4th.
Adapted for television by Emmy-winning co-creator of Adolescence, Jack Thorne and directed by Marc Munden (Utopia, National Treasure, Help). Lord of the Flies comes to Netflix May 4th.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82709728

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

trending_videos.title: NCAAM Final Four: Michigan vs. Arizona
trending_videos.description: The Wolverines play the Wildcats in the Final Four of the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship. Arizona returns to the Final Four for the first time since 2001; Michigan makes its first appearance since 2018. Yaxel Lendeborg faces Brayden Burries.

trending_videos.title: Air Supply — Making Love Out of Nothing at All (Sub. Español)
trending_videos.description:
🎙️ Artista | Air Supply
💿 Canción | Making Love Out of Nothing at All
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 01/07/1983
📻 Géneros Musicales | Pop

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
“Making Love Out of Nothing at All” de Air Supply es una de las baladas más poderosas del soft rock de los 80, escrita por Jim Steinman. La canción juega con un contraste brillante: el narrador afirma saber hacer casi todo en la vida… excepto una cosa imposible de dominar — dejar a la persona que ama. Es una declaración emocional intensa donde el amor no nace de condiciones, sino “de la nada”, desde la pura conexión y entrega.

📲 Sígue a "Air Supply" en:
▶️ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLIx3q_0KLVHAxgxsvh_vSQ

🪩 [ Letra / Lyrics ] 🪩

[Verse 1]
I know just how to whisper
And I know just how to cry
I know just where to find the answers
And I know just how to lie
I know just how to fake it
And I know just how to scheme
I know just when to face the truth
And then I know just when to dream
And I know just where to touch you

trending_videos.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
trending_videos.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi

insights.description: Entertainment-related content, including movies, TV series, and music, appears to dominate the trending list with 60% of the total videos. This suggests a strong audience interest in upcoming releases and popular franchises.
Sports content accounts for 30% of the trending videos, indicating a consistent demand for live sports events and highlights, particularly during major tournaments or matches.
Trailers for movies and TV shows are prominently featured, highlighting a significant interest in sneak peeks and teasers from various studios.

insights.description: Leading channels often diversify their content, ranging from trailers and news to sports and entertainment analysis, to capture varying audience interests.
Top channels typically have a single video making it to the trending list, indicating that a broad range of content creators is competing for viewer attention.
Given the high viewership and volume of entertainment-related content, there is potential to expand offerings in this area, particularly with exclusive sneak peeks or behind-the-scenes content.
With sports content trending, there is an opportunity to enhance coverage, provide detailed analyses, and create engaging highlight reels to attract sports enthusiasts.
The inclusion of a video with subtitles in Spanish suggests a demand for localized or translated content, presenting an opportunity to reach non-English speaking audiences.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
